title: Refactor visualizer/main.js monolithic file
description:
## 📝 User Story / Description
As a developer, I want to resolve the following quality debt items associated with Task 4 to keep the codebase maintainable.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Resolve refactor in [visualizer/rendering.js](file:///home/markg/Projects/nix-audio-visualizer/visualizer/rendering.js) (Reason: Stylistic duplication in peak hold logic)
- [ ] Resolve complexity in [desktop-visualizer.py](file:///home/markg/Projects/nix-audio-visualizer/desktop-visualizer.py) (Reason: Legacy structure requires nesting)
- [ ] Resolve churn in [desktop-visualizer.py](file:///home/markg/Projects/nix-audio-visualizer/desktop-visualizer.py) (Reason: Needed to add CORS fix)

## 🛠️ Technical Notes
- Automatically tracked and synchronized by Nomos Quality Debt Manager.

## 🛡️ Rigor & Verification Boundary
- **Target Files:**
  - `[MODIFY] visualizer/rendering.js`
  - `[MODIFY] desktop-visualizer.py`
- **Quality Debt Exemptions:**
  - `refactor: true`
  - `complexity: true`
  - `churn: true`

## 🤖 Swarm Routing & Metadata Configuration
- **Executing Node:** swarm:antigravity
- **Target Labels:** `agent:swarm:antigravity`
- **Size / Story Points:** Size:2
